posts.text:
The US/Israel bombed an elementary school in Shiraz, and it appears to be another case of AI identifying the target without human oversight. How so?

Because the name of the school contains the word "Shahed"...


Narjes Rahmati 🟩☫🟥 نرجس رحمتی (@Narjes_Rahmati)

Early this morning, the US-Israel bombed and destroyed Shahed Khomeini Elementary Boys' School in Shiraz.





— https://nitter.net/Narjes_Rahmati/status/2033421242125140029#m
RT @ahandjani: 🚨 The Strait of Hormuz is effectively closed. 20 million barrels per day which amounts to roughly 20% of all oil traded glob…

RT @nurdogandiyorki: There were many children around watching them — including the counter-protesters’ own children. 
The kids also witness…

Spain is the moral leader of Europe. Germany is currently the opposite.


José Manuel Albares (@jmalbares)

La situación en Líbano es una vergüenza para la humanidad.

Gaza y Cisjordania están olvidadas por la comunidad internacional.

Europa tiene que ser quien señale el camino que lleva a la coexistencia pacífica en Oriente Medio.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/jmalbares/status/2033501509221056851#m

The infantility of the German gov appears to have no limits. The German FM now says that "regimes like Iran cannot invoke international law.”

The most fundamental principle of international law is that it applies equally to all states. To challenge that is to declare yourself a rogue state.

Video

Asia is hit by Trump and Israel's war of choice first, but as @ahandjani writes, these early signs of a Covid 2.0 impact on the global economy will soon reach the US as well...
